meta.title: Kairo Phantom 100x Roadmap — Graphify Agent Memory

P0_FIX_FRICTION.title: Fix the Friction — Install in 60 Seconds

items.name: One-click EXE installer
items.gap: Need NSIS/Inno Setup pre-built .exe bundling binary + Ollama check + ONNX download + auto-start

items.name: Ollama auto-detection & setup
items.gap: Silent download/install Ollama, background model pull, tray progress

items.name: Replace doc injection with overlay
items.gap: PAHF clarifications need toast overlay, not document text injection

items.name: First-run onboarding flow
items.gap: GUI overlay: model selection, test prompt, preference survey seeding MemMachine

items.name: Startup time <200ms
items.gap: Benchmark + lazy-load ALL heavy modules (ONNX, Wasmtime, wgpu)

items.name: README rewrite
items.gap: User-first: hero GIF, 3 differentiators, single install command

items.name: Team memory sync (LAN)
items.gap: LAN sync protocol for shared brand voice

items.name: Memory export .kpx format
items.gap: JSON metadata + opaque binary vectors

items.name: Memory dashboard tray UI
items.gap: System tray HTML/Tauri panel showing preferences + confidence

items.name: Memory seeding from docs
items.gap: 'kairo seed <folder>' scanning docs for style patterns

items.name: KMB-1 benchmark (industry standard)
items.gap: Open-source eval harness, leaderboard, competitor submission, MMLU-level standard

items.name: Confidence transparency
items.gap: Optional overlay annotation on AI outputs

items.name: Memory as a Service (MCP server)
items.gap: kairo-memory MCP server: any agent (Claude/Cursor/Goose) can query doc preferences

items.name: Document health check
items.gap: Passive voice, brand deviation, consistency analysis on Alt+M with no selection

items.name: Cross-document consistency engine
items.gap: Compare open doc against reference corpus

items.name: Compliance clause scanner
items.gap: TOML-configurable prohibited phrase scanner (HIPAA/GDPR rules)

items.name: Intelligent section summarizer
items.gap: Selection-aware summarize to 3 bullets

items.name: Excel formula explainer + generator
items.gap: Parse A1 formulas, generate from natural language

items.name: PPT auto-concision mode
items.gap: Hard enforce max 25 words/bullet, 5 bullets/slide

items.name: DeepPresenter-9B integration
items.gap: Local DeepPresenter instance for research-grade PPTX generation

items.name: OWASP Agentic Top 10 compliance matrix
items.gap: Map sentinel/toolgate/WASM/SPIFFE/audit to OWASP controls, publish 1-page PDF
